nasb.text: Laban said, “It is better that I give her to you than to give her to another man; stay with me.”

esv.text: Laban said, “It is better that I give her to you than that I should give her to any other man; stay with me.”

cnv.text: 拉班說：“我把她給你，比給別人更好，你就與我同住吧。”

ccb.text: 拉班说：“把她嫁给你比嫁给外人好，你就留下来吧！”

csbs.text: 拉班说：“我把她交给你，比交给别人更好；你就与我一起住吧。”
